mapper.select:
SELECT cm.id, cm.user_id, cm.subject, cm.message, cm.create_time, u.nickname AS user_name, u.iphone AS user_phone FROM contact_message cm LEFT JOIN user u ON cm.user_id = u.id
AND (cm.subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cm.message LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.iphone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY cm.create_time DESC
